productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Lime Green Top
description: Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this lime green top from united colors of benetton. This wardrobe staple is a must have, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jean and comfortable-yet-stylish footwear.Product DetailsLime green top, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline and branding embroidered on the left hemMaterial and Care100% viscoseMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
